hello

Hello! 👋 Welcome! How can I help you today with your Odoo system for **RAY CONSTRUCTION L.L.C**?

Here are some things I can help you with:

- 📊 **Sales & Invoicing** — Check sales orders, invoices, payments
- 📦 **Inventory & Stock** — View stock levels, deliveries, receipts
- 🛒 **Purchasing** — Review purchase orders, vendor bills
- 👷 **Projects & Tasks** — Track project milestones, tasks
- 👥 **HR & Payroll** — Employee info, attendance, payslips, leaves
- 📈 **Reports** — Sales analysis, stock reports, financial reports

Just let me know what you'd like to look into!
